name: Bonnie Adult Cat Food - Salmon 1.5kg
description: Bonnie Salmon Adult Cat food, full-balanced, salmon protein-containing cat food carefully formulated by cat / dog nutritionists to meet the nutritional requirements of all adult breeds. Fish meal has been used as animal protein source. The balance of omega 3 & 6 is provided by using flaxseed . Yucca plant provides ammonia and odour control, increase absorption of nutrients, strengthens the immune system and optimises animal growth and performance. A good intestinal health and performance is provided by CitriStim ?which is a source of pathogen-binding? manna?oligsacharrides , beta-glucans and immune-supportive yeast. Healthy skin and shiny coat is supported by using brewer?s yeast . Muscles, organs and nerve cells are supported and the immune system strengthened by using whey powder . Rich vitamin ?contents. Rich fibre ?contents. NUTRIENT COMPONENTS Protein ......................32% Fat......................... 12% Crude Cellulose (Fiber) .....3% INGREDIENTS: Processed Animal Protein (Fish), Wheat, Corn, Animal Fat, Fish Meal, Corn Gluten, Fish Fat, Dried Sugar Beet, Fish Aroma, Salt, Flaxseed, Dried Brewer?s Yeast, Taurine. MINERALS: Calcium, Phosphorus, Sodium, Iodine, Zinc, Copper, Potassium Chloride, Iron, Selenium. VITAMINS: Vit. A, Vit. D, Vit. E, Vit. C, Vit. B1 - B2 - B3 (niacin) - B6 - B12 - B7 (biotin) - B9 (folic acid), Vit. K, Choline, Calcium Pantotetan.
